history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, tousled hair and black sunglasses is shown in a close-up portrait. He is shirtless, revealing his shoulders and upper chest. His face and neck are adorned with several red hickeys, some on his cheeks, jawline, and neck. A small, pink, cartoonish charm, possibly a strawberry, is attached to the arm of his sunglasses. The background is a plain, light gray wall, with a dark, slatted window or blind visible on the left side of the frame. The lighting is natural and appears to be from the side, creating subtle shadows on his face and body. A red circular icon with a white silhouette of a person walking and a diagonal line through it, indicating a "no walking" or "restricted area" symbol, is superimposed on his chest. The overall mood is suggestive and somewhat provocative due to the hickeys. The color palette is dominated by skin tones, black from the sunglasses and hair, and the red of the hickeys, contrasted with the neutral gray background.
